required_preferences.fact: Schedules sales team meetings at varied hours, including afternoons and evenings as needed, to accommodate new colleagues in wider global time zones — no longer restricts meetings to before 1pm

supersedes.fact: Schedules all sales team meetings before noon to accommodate different time zones — never allows meetings to run past 1pm

required_preferences.fact: Temporarily spends quiet Saturday mornings at home resting or reading, avoiding park walks until cleared by her doctor

supersedes.fact: Reserves Saturday mornings exclusively for long walks in the park — never schedules errands or work during this time

required_preferences.fact: Takes a 5-minute break away from the computer every 30 minutes during desk work to comply with her carpal tunnel regimen
Prepares homemade lunches Monday through Thursday — orders takeout only on Fridays
Checks work emails only between 8am and 6pm — never responds after hours unless it’s payroll related
Prefers listening to calming music or audiobooks while resting at home during her back recovery, instead of leisure activities that require physical movement

persona: A 28-year-old office administrator supporting a remote sales team
